0.text: Patchy, peripheral-subpleural consolidations at the bases of both lungs

1.text: Subpleural bands at the bases of both lungs

2.text: Architectural distortions at the bases of both lungs

3.text: Cylindrical bronchiectasis in the affected areas

4.text: Thickening in the lower part of the fissure on the left

5.text: Patchy ground glass infiltrates in both upper lobes
